author: @cs188

text:
Sorry for the confusion. My comment wasn't meant to be taken seriously either. I figured the video was a joke and wrote a comment that went along with it. But I guess that I need to remember, silly voices don't translate across text that well, hence the "?!?!" punctuation and all caps in the bottom line.

But yeah, good to talk to you again!
